Production & Shipping

This piece is ready to ship. All ready to ship orders will be posted the next business day, unless a custom resize has been requested.

During promotional offers and busy periods, our dispatch turnaround times are extended to 3-5 business days from purchase. 

We ship globally, using express priority shipping methods to ensure traceability and insurance, and offer complimentary worldwide shipping on all orders over $750 USD.

Duties and taxes levied by the recipient country are the responsibility of the customer.

For more details on shipping and delivery here.

INSURANCE
We partner with Centrestone Jewellery Insurance. We recommend learning more about their service and considering insurance on your treasured pieces. For more details, contact our team here.
